## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

### .Jules/palette.md
```
h2 2026-06-05 - Adding ARIA labels to custom icon buttons
h2 2024-06-06 - Settings Modal Accessibility Labels\nLearning: Many form inputs in the settings modal were lacking `id` and `htmlFor` associations.\nAction: Ensure all form inputs have associated labels with matching `id` and `htmlFor` attributes to improve screen reader accessibility and label clickability.
h2 2024-05-18 - [Persona Constraint Enforcement]
h2 2026-06-06 - Window Controls Accessibility
h2 2026-06-07 - [No Tailwind CSS] Learning: [The project does NOT use Tailwind CSS. Any focus styles must be applied via CSS-in-JS, inline styles, or global CSS variables, but crucially, inline `outline: 'none'` will override global CSS `:focus-visible` styles, breaking keyboard accessibility.] Action: [Ensure interactive elements like inputs and textareas do not explicitly set `outline: 'none'` unless a custom focus ring is explicitly handled in CSS.]
```

### .Jules/sentinel.md
```
h2 2024-05-18 - [Electron IPC Open External] Learning: External URLs passed to `shell.openExternal` must be validated against a strict protocol allowlist to prevent arbitrary code execution (e.g. `file://` or custom OS protocols). Action: Parse URLs using `new URL()` and check the `.protocol` property against an allowlist before execution.
h2 2024-05-18 - [Electron WebContents Security] Learning: Unrestricted window creation and navigation in Electron windows can lead to security vulnerabilities if a renderer is compromised. Action: Always implement `setWindowOpenHandler` returning `{ action: "deny" }` with safe external fallback, and listen to `will-navigate` to block untrusted domain navigation.
```

## .jules

### .jules/sentinel.md
```
h2 2024-06-06 - [Electron WebPreferences Sandbox & Context Isolation] \n **Vulnerability:** Unsandboxed Electron BrowserWindow with potential implicit Node integration.\n **Learning:** Electron windows should always explicitly disable nodeIntegration and enable contextIsolation and sandbox, even if defaults have changed over time, to ensure robust defense-in-depth against remote code execution and XSS escalations.\n **Prevention:** Review BrowserWindow configurations to ensure sandbox: true, contextIsolation: true, and nodeIntegration: false are explicitly set.
h2 2023-10-24 - Do Not Install @types/dompurify
```

